heading: Order of Secretary as to charges or practices; prescribing rates and practices generally
label: 211 Order of Secretary as to charges or practices; prescribing rates and practices generally
notes: Amendments1978—, in provision preceding subsec. (a), substituted “violative of section 205, 206 or 208 of this title” for “unjust, unreasonable, or discriminatory”.Pub. L. 95–409, § 1(b)(1)Subsec. (a). , substituted “May in accordance with the standard set forth in determine and prescribe what will be the rate” for “May determine and prescribe what will be the just and reasonable rate”, and “as the maximum or minimum or both” for “as both the maximum and minimum”, and inserted proviso relating to prescription by the Secretary of rates or charges on a percentage or per head basis at the election of the owner or agency or any other basis unless violative of .Pub. L. 95–409, § 1(b)(2)section 206 of this titlesection 206 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “other than the rate or charge or rates or charges” for “more or less than the rate or charge”.Pub. L. 95–409, § 1(b)(3)1939—Subsec. (a). Act , substituted “as both” for “or the”.Aug. 10, 1939Subsec. (b)(2). Act , substituted “more or less than the rate or charge so prescribed” for “other than the rate or charge so prescribed, or in excess of the maximum or less than the minimum so prescribed, as the case may be”.Aug. 10, 1939

children.label: a
children.text: May in accordance with the standard set forth in determine and prescribe what will be the rate or charge, or rates or charges, to be thereafter in such case observed as the maximum or minimum or both to be charged, and what regulation or practice is or will be just, reasonable, and nondiscriminatory to be thereafter followed: , That the Secretary shall prescribe the rate or charge, or rates or charges, on a percentage or per head basis at the election of the stockyard owner or market agency, or on any other basis elected by the stockyard owner or market agency unless the Secretary finds such other basis to be violative of ; andsection 206 of this titlesection 206 of this titleProvided

children.label: b
children.text: May make an order that such owner or operator (1) shall cease and desist from such violation to the extent to which the Secretary finds that it does or will exist; (2) shall not thereafter publish, demand, or collect any rate or charge for the furnishing of stockyard services other than the rate or charge or rates or charges so prescribed; and (3) shall conform to and observe the regulation or practice so prescribed.
